title: SOURCE NEEMISHA BANSAL 120 GRAMMAR RULES TOPIC ERROR QU

questions.question: [RULE 111: "IT IS I / ME" (SUBJECTIVE CASE)]
options: (a) It is (b) me (c) who (d) helped you.
questions.explanation: 'Be' family (is/am/are/was/were) ke baad subjective case aata hai agar wo subject ko define kare. 'It is I' sahi hai.

questions.question: Q1102. (a) It was (b) him (c) who (d) stole the pen.
questions.explanation: 'It was he' hona chahiye kyunki 'he' yahan subject hai jo action kar raha hai.

questions.question: Q1103. (a) If I (b) were (c) him, I (d) would accept the offer.
questions.explanation: Hypothetical condition mein bhi subjective case lagta hai: 'If I were he'.

questions.question: [RULE 112: "BUT / EXCEPT" FOLLOWED BY OBJECTIVE CASE]
questions.explanation: 'But' aur 'Except' jab preposition ki tarah use hon, toh inke baad objective case (me) aata hai.

questions.question: Q1105. (a) Nobody (b) except (c) she (d) knows the truth.
questions.explanation: 'Except' ke baad objective case 'her' ka use hona chahiye.

questions.question: [RULE 113: "ENOUGH" PLACEMENT]
options: (a) He is (b) enough lucky (c) to (d) win the prize.
questions.explanation: 'Enough' jab Adjective ko modify karta hai, toh uske baad aata hai. Sahi form: 'lucky enough'.

questions.question: Q1107. (a) She has (b) money enough (c) to (d) buy a car.
questions.explanation: 'Enough' jab Noun (money) ko modify karta hai, toh usse pehle aata hai. Sahi form: 'enough money'.

questions.question: [RULE 114: "SUCH...AS" VS "SUCH...THAT" (REVISION)]
options: (a) It was (b) such a (c) hot day (d) as I couldn't go out.
questions.explanation: Result dikhane ke liye 'such...that' ka pair banta hai. 'As' ki jagah 'that' aayega.

questions.question: [RULE 115: "WHO" FOR HUMANS, "WHICH" FOR ANIMALS/THINGS]
options: (a) The dog (b) who (c) is barking (d) is mine.
questions.explanation: Animals ke liye 'which' ya 'that' ka use hota hai, 'who' ka nahi.

questions.question: [RULE 116: POSSESSIVE CASE WITH "ING" (REVISION)]
options: (a) I (b) was (c) annoyed at (d) him coming late.
questions.explanation: Gerund (coming) se pehle possessive 'his' lagta hai. (Rule 51).

questions.question: [RULE 117: DOUBLE APOSTROPHE ERROR]
options: (a) My (b) brother's (c) friend's (d) car is new.
questions.explanation: Ek saath do apostrophe ('s) ka use galat hai. Sahi form: 'The car of my brother's friend'.

questions.question: Q1112. (a) Ram's (b) wife's (c) job (d) is hectic.
questions.explanation: Sahi form: 'The job of Ram's wife'.

questions.question: [RULE 118: APOSTROPHE WITH HISSING SOUND]
options: (a) For (b) conscience's (c) sake, (d) tell the truth.
questions.explanation: Jis word ke end mein 's' ki sound (hissing) ho, usme sirf apostrophe (') lagta hai, 's' nahi. Sahi: 'conscience' sake'.

questions.question: Q1114. (a) (b) Pythagoras's (c) theorem (d) is famous.
questions.explanation: 'Pythagoras' ke end mein 's' hai, isliye sirf 'Pythagoras' theorem' hona chahiye.

questions.question: [RULE 119: NO APOSTROPHE WITH PRONOUNS]
questions.explanation: Pronouns (Yours, Hers, Its, Ours, Theirs) mein kabhi apostrophe nahi lagta. Sahi: 'yours'.

questions.question: Q1116. (a) (b) It's (c) color (d) is blue.
questions.explanation: Possession ke liye 'Its' (bina apostrophe) hota hai. 'It's' ka matlab 'It is' hota hai.

questions.question: [RULE 120: WORDS NOT FOLLOWED BY NOUN]
questions.explanation: 'Afraid, Asleep, Aware, Unable, Alike' jaise words ke baad Noun nahi aata. 'He is a frightened boy' ya 'The boy is afraid' sahi hai.

questions.question: Q1118. (a) They (b) are (c) alike (d) brothers.
questions.explanation: 'Alike' ke baad noun nahi aayega. 'The brothers are alike' sahi hai.

questions.question: Q1119. (a) He (b) is (c) an (d) ill man.
questions.explanation: 'Ill' ke baad noun nahi aata. 'He is a sick man' ya 'The man is ill' sahi hai.

questions.question: Q1120. (a) I am (b) a (c) glad (d) person to meet you.
questions.explanation: 'Glad' ke baad noun nahi lagate. 'I am glad to meet you' sahi hai.
